recommended_actions.action: Human/tinker: Fix ISS-975 (eg-verdicts false-dilemma list item overlap) and ISS-976 (WIN-044 mischaracterization in eg-falsifiability) in generate-html.js.
recommended_actions.detail: Both are generate-html.js edits that cannot be self-applied. ISS-975: in the count-inflation paragraph, verify whether false-dilemma subtype list item (3) has logical overlap and drop if so. ISS-976: line 1418 says WIN-044 and WIN-057 'produce values that either match standard physics or contradict measurement' — WIN-044 is actually Self-Contradicted (dome's own equations conflict), not a standard-physics match or measurement contradiction. Fix to: 'WIN-044 self-contradicts (dome's own geometry yields incompatible values), WIN-057 produces a value matching standard physics'.
